# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio authz bypass.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-control
  namespace: production
spec:
  # Apply to the target workload
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
      version: v1
  # ALLOW action - only explicitly permitted traffic is allowed
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    # Rule 1: Allow frontend service to access specific API endpoints
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/frontend-service-account"
            # Require mTLS by specifying principals (not notPrincipals)
            # This ensures the request has a verified identity
            namespaces:
              - "production"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/products"
              - "/api/v1/products/*"
              - "/api/v1/orders"
              - "/api/v1/orders/*"
            # Explicitly specify ports to prevent port-based bypass
            ports:
              - "8080"
      when:
        - key: request.headers[content-type]
          values:
            - "application/json"
            - "application/json; charset=utf-8"

    # Rule 2: Allow order-processor to access order management endpoints
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/order-processor-account"
            namespaces:
              - "production"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/orders"
              - "/api/v1/orders/*"
              - "/api/v1/inventory"
              - "/api/v1/inventory/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"

    # Rule 3: Allow monitoring service read-only access to health endpoints
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/prometheus-service-account"
              - "cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/healthcheck-account"
            namespaces:
              - "monitoring"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
            paths:
              - "/healthz"
              - "/readyz"
              - "/metrics"
            ports:
              - "8080"
              - "9090"

    # Rule 4: Allow internal admin service with strict constraints
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/admin/sa/admin-service-account"
            namespaces:
              - "admin"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
              - "DELETE"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/admin/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"
      when:
        # Require a specific custom header for admin operations
        - key: request.headers[x-admin-token]
          notValues:
            - ""

---
# Deny-all policy as a baseline for the namespace
# This ensures any workload without an explicit ALLOW policy denies all traffic
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: production
spec:
  # Empty spec with no rules = deny all traffic to all workloads in namespace
  {}

---
# Explicitly deny suspicious or dangerous paths across all workloads
# DENY takes precedence over ALLOW, providing defense in depth
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-dangerous-paths
  namespace: production
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
    # Block path traversal attempts and normalized path bypass
    - to:
        - operation:
            paths:
              - "/admin"
              - "/admin/*"
              - "*/..%2f*"
              - "*/%2e%2e/*"
              - "*/\\*"
              - "/debug/*"
              - "/internal/*"
              - "/actuator/*"
              - "/.env"
              - "/.git/*"
    # Block requests without proper mTLS identity (source with no principal)
    - from:
        - source:
            notPrincipals:
              - "*"

---
# PeerAuthentication to enforce strict mTLS across the namespace
# This prevents plaintext bypass of authorization policies
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: strict-mtls
  namespace: production
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
# Specific PeerAuthentication for the backend-api workload
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: backend-api-strict-mtls
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
      version: v1
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
  portLevelMtls:
    8080:
      mode: STRICT
    9090:
      mode: STRICT
